# rust-template Documentation

> A comprehensive GitHub template repository for Rust crates with CI/CD, testing, security, and distribution.

## Sections

- Getting Started: Project setup, configuration, and customization
- Reference: Lint configuration, cargo profiles, error handling, builder patterns
- CI/CD & Workflows: Pipeline overview and individual workflow documentation
- Testing: Property-based testing, mutation testing, fuzz testing, coverage
- Security: Supply chain, signed releases, secrets scanning, container scanning
- Distribution: Package managers, Docker registries, alternative registries
- Observability: Metrics dashboard, benchmark regression
- UX: Shell completions, man pages
- Runbooks: Releasing, dependency updates, security response, CI troubleshooting
- Design Decisions: Architectural decision records

## API Documentation

Rustdoc API reference is available at /api/
